response.justification: Bogdan has 20 years of hands-on engineering experience across a broad set of domains and shows genuine breadth, but the Principal Engineer (AI Strategy) role demands a Director-level IC with recognized, deep AI expertise, cloud platform strategy experience, and a track record of advising enterprise customers. His AI exposure is limited to recent agentic tooling work started in April 2025 and lacks demonstrated AI product or platform leadership at scale. There is no advanced degree in an AI-related field, no cloud platform strategy work, and no evidence of the external thought-leadership or senior advisory experience the role explicitly requires.
strengths: 20+ years of engineering experience spanning web, mobile, embedded, and backend systems, well exceeding the 15-year minimum
Recent hands-on AI agent infrastructure contributions at re:cinq, including MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks
Entrepreneurial and founder experience (GISCollective), community teaching via workshops, and public conference speaking demonstrating knowledge-sharing ability
concerns: No advanced degree in AI or ML; credentials are a BS in Computer Science and a BA in Fine Arts, not aligned with the preferred MS/PhD in an AI-related field
AI expertise is nascent — the only AI work appears in the current role begun April 2025 — with no demonstrated AI products or platforms built and shipped at scale
No evidence of director-level IC scope, cloud platform strategy ownership, or advising strategic enterprise customers on AI/cloud adoption

key_factors.factor: AI expertise depth and track record
Absence of advanced AI/ML degree and cloud strategy leadership
